01 · About

AI tools expert & rapid prototyping engineer — approaching technology with a futurist's eye. Obsessed with finding pattern, beauty, and hidden potential in both code and the world around me.

Deep hands-on mastery of frontier AI models — Claude, Grok, and ChatGPT — with an instinct for anticipating where technology is heading 5–10 steps before it arrives. Proven track record of designing and shipping complex, working systems independently: from BCI concepts in 2017 to full AI agents today. Arrived in Scotland at age 11 with zero English; built fluency through sheer resilience — the same self-directed drive powering every build. Currently offering AI consulting and automation services to businesses across Poland.

Stack Claude· Make.com· Vercel· Supabase· JavaScript· HTML/CSS· Figma
